failedAssertions.reason: Duplicate SVG icon markup found in App.js and ModuleList.js. Grid icon pattern duplicated in App.js:320 (hamburger menu Dashboard button). Video icon pattern duplicated in ModuleList.js:178 (list view video count). Lab/atom icon pattern duplicated in ModuleList.js:198-200 (list view lab count). These inline SVGs match the shared components in Icons.jsx but were not replaced with imports. The shared-icon-components feature (icons milestone) only covered 12 specific inline SVGs in DashboardSections.js, GoalCard.js, and 2 in ModuleList.js (view toggle buttons). The remaining inline SVGs in App.js (hamburger menu icons) and ModuleList.js (list view info icons) were not in scope for either milestone.
